description_long: This is a classic freestanding desk with a rectangular wooden top and a painted base, featuring a single cabinet door and a drawer on the left side. The top surface is a medium brown wood grain, contrasting with the light gray painted body. The left side of the desk includes a recessed panel door and a drawer above it, both with simple round knobs. The right side and back panels are solid with decorative molding, lacking any openings or hardware. The desk stands on short, bracket-style feet, giving it a sturdy and traditional appearance. Its design is functional and elegant, suitable for use in offices, studies, or as a street-side worktable in urban environments.
description: A traditional desk with a brown wood top and light gray painted base, featuring a left-side cabinet door and drawer. The design is sturdy, with decorative molding and bracket feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wood top, left-side cabinet door, and drawer with knobs.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid panel and the wood grain top.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back panel and the wood top.
description_view_3: Right side view with a solid panel and no visible hardware.
